tier_predicates.gate1: Corpus: every labeled case produces its complete predeclared (status, invocations, reason-category) tuple.
tier_predicates.gate2: Replay: the full inventory (580-entry baseline plus post-#103 entries) matches the S6.4 tuple comparison with zero divergences outside predeclared categories.
tier_predicates.gate3: Tier 1 rendered managed workflows: exactly the (ci, false), (check, false), and (lint, false) findings with zero diagnostics.
tier_predicates.gate4: Tier 2 checked-in PR workflows: exactly the predeclared pruning and not-applicable outcome, zero findings, zero diagnostics.
tier_predicates.gate5: Tier 3A documented conformance: complete tuples, zero unexpected.
tier_predicates.gate6: Tier 3B envelope fixtures: at most 2/20 total indeterminate, at most 2/20 newly indeterminate, false-positive exactly zero, false-safe exactly zero.
tier_predicates.gate7: Differential oracles: pinned Bash and shfmt on representative and disagreement cases, zero false-safe.
tier_predicates.gate8: Offset oracle: multibyte text, parse errors, nested sites, and template positions before, inside, and after {0} produce exact expected raw-text indices.
